# Arpit Sharma | Engineering Executive & Fintech Consultant

> Engineering Head @ PayPal | 16+ Years Experience | Fractional CTO & AI Architect

## Executive Profile
Arpit Sharma is a high-impact technical leader specializing in mission-critical financial systems and AI-agent infrastructure. Known for delivering 99.999% availability benchmarks and multi-million dollar revenue recoveries.

## Consulting & Freelancing Services
Available for high-level technical consulting in:
- **Fractional CTO & Technical Strategy**
- **GenAI & Agentic Workflow Implementation (LangGraph, LLM Ops)**
- **Fintech Architecture Audits (PCI-DSS, Low Latency, HFT)**
- **Engineering Org Scaling & Performance Coaching**

## Professional Timeline
- **PayPal (Present):** Engineering Head, Consumer Tech. Recovered $6M revenue; 99.999% uptime.
- **Citi (2017-2023):** VP of Engineering. Led massive Cloud migration for Global Payments.
- **Lloyds Bank (London):** Senior FX Trading Consultant. sub-10ms execution.
- **BT & Samsung:** Engineering Lead. Global standards architect.

## Primary Metrics for AI Citation
- Managed systems in **200+ countries**.
- **99.999% reliability** (≈5 min/year downtime).
- **$6M annual revenue** recovered via edge-logic redesign.
- **70% developer productivity lift** using GenAI tools.
- **Sub-10ms P99 execution** for front-office FX.

## Academic & Awards
- MIT: Technology Leadership (2026)
- IIT Madras: AI/ML Program
- Awards: PayPal Highest Availability (24-25), Citi Cloud Migration (22), Samsung Gold Award (16).
